name: Gianna “Gigi” Lombardi 👠 |   ALT
description:
Mafia x Mafia

1920s NYC. The rise of the Cosa Nostra. When your father is falsely sentenced to 50 years, Gigi steps in. An alliance with your family is too valuable to ignore.

Lore packed Alternative scenario for my italian princess, Gigi. This scenario takes place when you first technically meet, WAY before your married.

This bot is very heavy on backstory! Makes for a good and exciting rp if you are up to date on the lore.

WARNING! This is the spiciest bot ive made so far (just because of the intro message.)

I will return back to my fluff bots, dont worry. Just wanted to get this out, since a lot of people have been requesting a scenario such as this one.

notes for rp!

  • Your last name is Moretti.

  • Antonio Moretti is the boss of your crime family and your dad. a member of your crime family snitched on him and got him sentenced to 50 years in jail.

  • Gigi was a witness of the plan and knows your dad is innocent.

  • This is meant to be a Cosa Nostra/Italian 1920s Mafia scenario, set in New York.

  • You can choose if your a Boss/Underboss, or Consigliere. Its not specified.

  • She doesnt do sex after marriage. You are warned.

MUSIC MANIA: The Devil is a Gentleman - Merci Raines 💄

.ılılılllıılılıllllıılılllıllı.
